title: gymnadenia × wucherpfennigiana
intro: Gymnadenia × wucherpfennigiana, also known as the hybrid lady's-tresses, is a type of orchid plant that is a result of a natural cross between two different species of Gymnadenia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Gymnadenia × wucherpfennigiana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or dried extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
